menu_cargar_demo_confirmar_mensaje: An automatic backup will be created and current data will be replaced by a demo dataset. Continue?
menu_reiniciar_confirmar_mensaje: Do you want to restart the welcome wizard?
menu_reiniciar_ok: The wizard will be shown again on next startup.
on_failed_enter_ui: Processing startup failure on UI thread
on_finished_enter_ui: Processing startup completion on UI thread
splash_error_mensaje: Startup could not be completed. Incident ID: {incident_id}
startup_error_dialog_message: The application startup could not be completed.
startup_fallback_mensaje: No visible window was detected after startup. You can retry showing the main window.
startup_timeout_message: Startup is taking longer than expected
startup_worker_no_terminal_signal: Startup worker did not emit a terminal signal. Stage: {etapa}
sync.configuracion_faltante_aviso:
Could not start synchronization.
Likely cause: Google Sheets is not configured.
Recommended action: Click Go to settings, save the data, and retry.
sync.permisos_bloqueados_log: Synchronization blocked by Google Sheets permissions
sync.primero_simular_aviso: Run a simulation first to generate the plan.
sync.sin_cambios_aplicar: There are no changes to apply
sync_permission_blocked_message_with_ema: Insufficient permissions in Google Sheets. Share the sheet with the service account: {service_account_email}
sync_permission_blocked_message_without_: Insufficient permissions in Google Sheets. Share the sheet with the service account: <email unavailable>
ui.conflictos.duplicado_mensaje: There is already a matching record. ID {id} · Date {fecha} · From {desde} · To {hasta} · Full day {completo}.
ui.conflictos.solape_mensaje: The time range overlaps with an existing record. ID {id} · Date {fecha} · From {desde} · To {hasta} · Full day {completo}.
ui.error_details.title: Error details
ui.solicitudes.corrige_formulario: Fix the form and click 'Add pending' again.
ui.solicitudes.no_pudo_guardar: The request could not be saved.
ui.solicitudes.revisa_formulario: Review date/time range and fix the highlighted fields.
ui.solicitudes.selecciona_delegada: Select a delegate in Settings and try again.
wizard_bienvenida_texto: This app helps you register and manage union hours in a simple way.
wizard_conceptos_texto: Credit is your available balance. A record is each request you save in the app.
wizard_pref_fullscreen: Open in full screen by default
wizard_sync_texto: Sync is needed to keep the delegates group coordinated and to share access credentials.
